title: National Prosecutions Service (Appointment of Public Prosecutors) Notice, 2023
title_en: National Prosecutions Service (Appointment of Public Prosecutors) Notice, 2023

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the National Prosecutions Service (Appointment of Public Prosecutors) Notice, 2023.

provisions.title: Appointment of public prosecutors
provisions.content: (1) The persons whose names are specified in the Schedule are appointed to be public prosecutors for purposes of prosecuting criminal cases on behalf of the Director of Public Prosecutions.

provisions.title: Validity
provisions.content: (1) This Notice shall be valid for five years from the date of coming into operation. (2) Notwithstanding subparagraph (1), a public prosecutor appointed under this Notice may serve for a period of less than five years where such person’s employment in the Public service is determined or when such appointment by the Director of Public Prosecutions. Schedule (made under paragraph 2) Appointment of public prosecutor S/N Name 1. PF. 19494 Inspector John S. Ijumba 2. PF. 22258 A/Inspector Asifiwe Mshana 3. PF. 21375 A/Inspector Elizabeth Lucas 4. G 1748 D/Cpl Frank Maugo 5. WP 12520 PC Leila Kulanderah 6. PF 19643 Inspector Trudo Bandiho 7. H. 957 D/Cpl Mashishanga Fumbuka 8. G. 1573 D/Cpl Juma Abdul Athuman 9. G. 3702 D/Cpl Isaya Ubamba 10. Ndona Taziri Lweno 11. PF. 19970 Insp. Jasmine Jumanne Itiga 12. F. 2196 D/Ssgt. Anold Emmanuel Kiwoli 13. 3619 D/Ssgt, Abdallah Juma Jumla 14. Pf. 23113 A/Insp. Ibrahimu Esawangu Kyara 15. Richard Casmir Ndobho 16. Debora Elisha Mlowe 17. A/Insp. Rose Clemence 18. A/Insp. Emmanuel Peol Limonga 19. A/Insp. Lunadus Leus Kaukuye 20. Insp.
